sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91717" key="puri/pais" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῠρί-παις</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">παιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n91717.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Son of fire</tr_>, of Dionysus, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4:287" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.287</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
